title: #claude Chat vs. Cowork: Biggest 3 differences
summary: Claude Cowork is positioned as an advanced variant of Claude Chat with three key improvements: direct file access from the user's computer without upload limits or file size caps, a larger context window that preserves conversation details longer, and integrated output generation that produces ready-to-use files directly in folders rather than chat-based responses.
